name: reqly-workspace
description: Git-native product requirements, verification, and traceability

scripts.build: npm run build -w @reqly/core && npm run build -w @reqly/cli && npm run build -w @reqly/mcp && npm run build -w reqly-vscode
scripts.check: npm run build -w @reqly/core && npm run check -w @reqly/core && npm run check -w @reqly/cli && npm run check -w @reqly/mcp && npm run check -w reqly-vscode
scripts.package:vscode: npm run build && cd packages/vscode && npx @vscode/vsce package --no-dependencies --allow-missing-repository --out ../../reqly.vsix
